signature.signatureValidationRules: ISO 32000-1:2008 and Adobe Supplement to the ISO 32000-1:2008, Base Level 1.7, Extension Level 3

event.eventDetail: Access Content Package created from Submission Information Package P0b002ee1bb1f276f

Content in package contained errors (such as a corrupt file, incorrect date tagging, missing title) that made it unsuitable for public access. No ACP was created, and a copy of the package has been sent to pre-ingest processing as SIP P0b002ee1bb1f276f for correction and resubmission. This AIP has been put into the queue for deletion approval

rightsStatementIdentifier.rightsStatementIdentifierValue: Copyright protection under this title is not available for any work of the United States Government pursuant to Title 17 United States Code chapter 1 section 105
